title: Add `env_merge` to containers.conf
body:
### Feature request description

Add `env_merge` to containers.conf configuration file, similar to `env` and `env_host`.


### Suggest potential solution

`env_merge` be available from configuration file.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

No alternatives possible

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: bt.  why are not all options available from configuration file by default anyway?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I am trying to resolve this and waiting for https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/791 to be merged as this one is dependent on it.
